top_signals.title: Iraq Could Quit OPEC in Bid to Pump More Oil
top_signals.summary: OPEC’s second-largest producer, Iraq, is considering exiting the cartel if the organization rejects Baghdad’s plan to boost its oil production quota in line with some of the other members, sources in the Iraqi government have told local news outlet Shafaq. Iraq proposes to boost its oil exports to compensate for the losses in production and sales it has incurred since the start of the war, according to Shafaq’s sources. The federal government is also estimating the impact of Iraq potentially exceeding its production quota in the…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Brent Oil Erases Wartime Gains as Hormuz Reopening Boosts Supply - Bloomberg
top_signals.summary: Brent Oil Erases Wartime Gains as Hormuz Reopening Boosts Supply  Bloomberg
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: H&M misses sales target as cost-cutting leaves retailer understocked
top_signals.summary: H&M slumped to lower than expected sales and profit as the retailer warned that its cost-cutting drive is leaving some stores unable to keep up with demand. The Swedish-listed firm took 54.8bn kronor (£4.2bn) in sales in the three months to the end of May, flat year on year. Its operating profit jumped by 11 [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ripple launches RLUSD stablecoin in Japan after regulatory approval
top_signals.summary: Ripple's RLUSD stablecoin is available through SBI VC Trade for both institutional and retail users in the country.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Micron’s profit surge fuels rebound in global tech stocks
top_signals.summary: US chipmaker’s bumper quarterly profits calm investor fears after market sell-off this week

top_signals.title: Micron stock jumps over 16% in premarket trading after blockbuster earnings
top_signals.summary: The company's revenue more than quadrupled from $9.3 billion a year earlier to $41.46 billion, it reported on Wednesday
